'''鈭歨-m-r-ch''' ('''kahamrechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:twinkle|twinkle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-m-r-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:twinkle|twinkle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-m-r-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kahamrechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
